source.title: How to attack Hookah/Billiards on Coastline
source.notes: Single-site walkthrough for the Hookah/Billiards site (same site as coastline_defense.json's 'hookah-billiards'), built around an Ace roof breach into Aqua supported by Osa, plus a Lion/Nomad ground-floor lockdown and a Monty distraction on Hookah door. Includes a live gameplay-clip run-through at the end. Auto-generated captions: 'Salas'/'Salma'/'salmer' = Ace's S.E.L.M.A. Aqua Breacher charges (corrected throughout); 'Hodor' = Hookah door; 'oer'/'oosa'/'OA'/'O' = Osa; 'noad'/'nad' = Nomad. Enemy utility named in passing (Maloi banshees/Melusi Banshee, Alam mines/Aruni mines, Fenri/Fenrir, Pulse, Valk) are Defense-side and referenced only as counters/threats to plan around, not Attack picks. Rewrite pass: could not obtain reliable top-down blueprint grounding for Coastline (Ubisoft's blueprint download link 404s, r6maps.com requires JS rendering not available to this tool, and Liquipedia/Fandom/siege.gg/r6coaching pages returned no usable spatial/orientation detail) — per spec rule 8, no compass directions have been added anywhere in this file; all locations remain room/feature names only.

gadgetPlacements.note: Throw 2-3 S.E.L.M.A. Aqua Breacher charges across the top of the wall (third charge on the other side, optional) to open sightlines into Pink Bar and Billiards. Hold the roof afterward, watching the Hookah-to-Billiards rotate and the area behind Pink Bar, until called to support Osa in Aqua.
Place an Airjab Launcher above the double door into Sunrise as Lion enters, to deny anyone pushing through after Lion takes the room.
Second Airjab Launcher above Hookah door, backup in case Monty dies.
Shoot out the top of the luggage window from Aqua Balcony, then place a third Airjab Launcher on the luggage door to deny a flank through Luggage.
Place the first shield on the very bottom-left of the double window. Nomad plays behind it on repel afterward, holding Luggage, Pink Bar, and the 90 rotate.
Once Aqua is cleared with Ace's support, place a second shield on a diagonal near the bomb, then a further shield, and plant behind it.
Sit crouched behind the bar in Sunrise for the whole round holding the angle toward the double window upstairs. Pop scans and flashes to support the plant once it starts going down.

Stand on Hookah door with shield extended, moving in and out as a pure distraction — not meant to peek or trade. Stay alive to keep the decoy credible. Push in aggressively only once defenders turn their attention to Aqua.

Enter Sunrise, hop onto the bar then onto a small sub-roof, tuck the drone in the corner. Drop it onto a shelf once the round starts for cover of the double door and bone-peeks. Confirm Sunrise is clear before Lion pushes in.

gadgetPlacements.location: Prep-Phase Drone — Aqua (under the fish tank)
gadgetPlacements.note: Route: flight case, electrical box, along the wall, around the edge to Aqua Balcony, straight left under the chair on entering through the double door, tucked under the middle of the fish tank. Gives a view behind the bar and toward Luggage/Aqua.
Bring through Hookah door in the prep phase using the speed boost, dive under the benches for callouts on Hookah door traffic.

operatorRecommendations.note: Opens the Quad Wall from the roof with S.E.L.M.A. charges, holds the Hookah-Billiards rotate and Pink Bar angle, then moves to support Osa's push into Aqua once called.
Places the Billiards double-window shield (later handed off to Nomad), pushes into Aqua with Ace's support, places further shields near the bomb, and plants behind it.

Places three Airjab Launchers (Sunrise double door, Hookah door backup, Luggage door), then holds the Billiards double-window position behind Osa's shield, covering Luggage, Pink Bar, and the 90 rotate.

Holds Sunrise from behind the bar the entire round for a pick on anyone peeking the double window. Supports the plant with scans and flashes once it goes down. Optional in a minimal 3-stack in favour of just Nomad/Osa/Ace.
Not essential with only 3 players, but effective at pulling defender attention away from the real Aqua push.

generalTips.note: Works with as few as 3 players — Nomad + Osa + Ace, or Nomad + Osa + Lion. Quad Wall holes from Ace materially help; Monty on Hookah door is a luxury, not a requirement.
The whole ground floor and most of the top floor south of the Sunrise/Blue Bar/Office line can be ignored — only Sunrise, Hookah Balcony, Hookah, Billiards/Pink Bar, Aqua, and the roof matter.

Clearing Aqua is the only genuinely tricky part of the strat — Osa alone can be held from the Hookah rotate, from behind the Aqua bar, or from Luggage, which is why Ace is pulled off the roof to support that push.

Watch for a defender playing Pulse or Valkyrie on the floor below the default plant spot for a C4 read — drone and deal with them, or give away a free C4 on the plant. Easier if it's a Pulse, since three attackers can collapse on that single position.
If a trade has to be made, Lion or Monty are the least costly losses — keep Osa, Ace, and Nomad alive above all, since they're needed to open, hold, and plant the site.
Rated one of the easiest sites to attack on the whole game, just slightly behind the Border bathroom/tellers hatch-drop attack.
